ddls:
CREATE TABLE "model_iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model iteration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with the iteration */,
  "accuracy_class_0" REAL /* Accuracy metric for class 0 */,
  "accuracy_class_1" REAL /* Accuracy metric for class 1 */,
  "accuracy_class_2" REAL /* Accuracy metric for class 2 */,
  "accuracy_class_3" REAL /* Accuracy metric for class 3 */,
  "accuracy_class_4" REAL /* Accuracy metric for class 4 */,
  "accuracy_class_5" REAL /* Accuracy metric for class 5 */,
  "iteration_date" TEXT /* Date of the iteration */,
  "iteration_version" TEXT /* Version of the iteration */,
  "training_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training process in seconds */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for training */,
  "hyperparameters_json" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used in a JSON format */,
  "training_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the training was conducted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the iteration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_iterations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_iterations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classifier, regressor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model's purpose */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "latest_version" TEXT /* Latest version of the model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the model */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the model's code repository */,
  "model_size" INTEGER /* Size of the model in MB */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Framework used for the model */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* Dependencies required for the model in a JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was added to the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., public, private) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was added to the system */,
  "size_gb" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in GB */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "number_of_files" INTEGER /* Number of files in the dataset */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last modified */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the dataset is distributed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_datasets" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter entry */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model iteration */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the training parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the training parameter */,
  "parameter_group" TEXT /* Group of the parameter */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_parameters_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES model_iterations ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated model iteration */,
  "log_entry" TEXT /* Log entry containing details about the training process */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log (e.g., INFO, ERROR) */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log (e.g., training script, evaluation script) */,
  "log_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the log entry in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_logs_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES model_iterations ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated iteration */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES model_iterations ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Permission to edit the model (true/false) */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Permission to view the model (true/false) */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Permission to delete the model (true/false) */,
  "can_share" INTEGER /* Permission to share the model (true/false) */,
  "can_export" INTEGER /* Permission to export the model (true/false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated iteration */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES model_iterations ("iteration_id")
)
